title: viola lanceolata var. vittata
intro: Viola lanceolata var. vittata, also known as Vittata Pansy, is a variety of the heartleaf violet, a flowering plant in the Viola genus. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe and calm irritated skin, wounds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Viola lanceolata var. vittata include reducing inflammation, promoting relaxation, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular remedy for anxiety, insomnia, and colds. Herbal preparations of Viola lanceolata var. vittata include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent.
